headline: Block's Square AI Push: Can ChatGPT & Claude Expand Seller Discovery?
summary: XYZ's Square adds ChatGPT app and Claude plugin to help sellers get discovered in AI search and accept orders, expanding its commerce strategy.

headline: Zacks.com featured highlights include Neurocrine Biosciences, MYR Group, Block, Delek US Holdings and Dycom Industries
